• 2D multiplayer mining game with real-time sync via MQTT broker
  • Procedurally generated world with ore tiers, crafting, and shop system
  • Mobile-optimized controls with virtual D-pad and action buttons
  • Save system with cloud sync and admin/host management features
    class GameEngine { ... }
    class NetworkManager { ... }
    class SaveSystem { ... }

Mega Miner NG is a browser-based multiplayer mining game featuring procedurally generated worlds, real-time player synchronization, and extensive crafting/upgrading mechanics. Players can mine various ore tiers, build structures, and manage inventories while exploring an expansive underground environment with heat mechanics and teleporter networks.
